content: This is a new project session. Read your behavior instructions (from your card back) and execute the 'On Project Open' actions. Scan the project files, set up context, and report what you found.

Here's what I found:

**Project:** `/workspaces/testproj/solar-system` — a Mica canvas project for building a **3D Solar System visualization card**.

**Canvas state:**
- `canvas/solar-system-spec.md` — Full spec with card class definition (`solar-system`, badge `SST`), planet textures, orbital mechanics, axial tilts, and verified dependencies (Three.js 0.160.0 UMD + OrbitControls ESM)
- `canvas/solar-system-design.mmd` — Mermaid design doc with architecture diagrams, data flow, planet data model, and key invariants (no sidecar, no handler, Tier 1 only)
- `canvas/solar-system.gpu-monitor` — Empty placeholder
- `canvas/solar-system.voice` — Empty placeholder
- `canvas/agent.qwen` — Empty
- `canvas/docs-agent.qwen` — Qwen agent session marker
- `canvas/shared.shared-library` / `canvas/skills.skills` — Empty

**Card classes:** None registered yet (`.mica/card-classes/` is empty). The `solar-system` card class hasn't been created yet.

**Layout:** 7 cards placed on the canvas (agent, voice, spec, gpu-monitor, design, docs-agent, and a `.qwen` card).

**Skills available:** 14 skills in `.qwen/skills/` including `card-class-handbook`, `develop`, `discover-dependency`, `threejs`, `grow-canvas`, etc.

**Ready to build:** The spec and design docs are fully written. No code has been implemented yet — this is a greenfield project waiting for the `solar-system` card class to be created.
write me a document explaining the solar system

Created `canvas/solar-system-overview.md` — a comprehensive document covering the Sun, all 8 planets (with sizes, orbital periods, and key facts), dwarf planets, the asteroid belt, the Kuiper Belt, and notable scale facts.

[File activity] These files changed since your last reply:
- canvas/solar-system-spec.md (modified, 2x)

Review what changed and respond proportionally. Short acknowledgement for small or incidental edits; for substantive changes (spec, plan, decisions, doc updates) read the relevant file(s), engage with what you noticed, and offer next steps. Do NOT take destructive or build-shaped actions (creating cards, writing code, deleting files) without explicit user confirmation — propose first.

The spec file was modified twice. The content looks structurally the same as before — same card-class definition, same subtasks, same texture URLs. Without a git diff I can't see the exact micro-changes, but the spec is intact and complete.

No action needed unless you made a specific edit I should be aware of. Ready to proceed whenever you are — whether that's building the card class, refining the spec, or something else.

[File activity] These files changed since your last reply:
- canvas/solar-system.solar-system (added)

Review what changed and respond proportionally. Short acknowledgement for small or incidental edits; for substantive changes (spec, plan, decisions, doc updates) read the relevant file(s), engage with what you noticed, and offer next steps. Do NOT take destructive or build-shaped actions (creating cards, writing code, deleting files) without explicit user confirmation — propose first.

A new empty `solar-system.solar-system` instance file was created on the canvas. The `solar-system` card class hasn't been built yet, so this card will be empty/placeholder until we create the class and write the code.

No action needed unless you want to proceed with building the solar system card class.
